data.body:
[‘Secret Midnight Party’ Yuuka & Noa Voice Message Release!]

Yuuka and Noa have prepared special voice messages just for you, Sensei!
Watch the video or download the audio files to enjoy them anytime, anywhere~

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2936527
